chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1465 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 25.10.2023 None present. No intimation is received. The case file shows that since filing of this petition on 26.09.2023, petitioners and their Counsel have not pursued this petition. Accordingly, petition is dismissed in non-prosecution along with pending application, if any. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
